tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Focused spreadsheet helpers and internal editorial utilities for SheetHub.
tools.hero_title: Small tools for cleaner spreadsheets and faster execution.
tools.hero_body: This workspace now stays intentionally narrow: practical utilities for spreadsheet-driven operations and one internal prompt workflow for SheetHub editorial production.
tools.hero_scope_value: Excel imports, spreadsheet cleanup, and repeatable label output
tools.hero_access_value: Internal team tools with controlled Google login
tools.hero_workflow_value: Daily spreadsheet handling, lightweight ops, and content planning
tools.spreadsheet_section_desc: Utilities that still depend on structured rows, workbook imports, or spreadsheet-shaped operational data.
tools.editorial_section_desc: Development-only helpers used to plan SheetHub spreadsheet content and editorial direction.
tools.login_desc: Sign in with your SheetHub account to access internal spreadsheet utilities and controlled editorial workflows.

address_label.title: Address Label from Spreadsheet
address_label.description: Import and export Excel address books, then generate clean PDF shipping labels.

systemNotReady.title: System Not Ready
systemNotReady.description: The application cannot detect the Firebase API Key from your dashboard.
systemNotReady.step1Desc: Select the SheetHub repository in the Deployment tab and click Save.
systemNotReady.step2Desc: Go to the Rollouts tab and click Start Rollout to inject the latest variables.
systemNotReady.step3Desc: Ensure variable names in the Environment tab start with NEXT_PUBLIC_.
systemNotReady.footer: Without a 'Start Rollout' process, the browser is not authorized to read secret keys for security reasons.
systemNotReady.restrictedDesc: The {tool} tool requires a registered Google account login to maintain system integrity.

employeeHistory.searchDescription: Search by name, position, or group. You can also type a date (e.g., 20/05/2023) to see who was active on that day.
employeeHistory.generatorDescription: Quickly identify the correct signers for specific document types based on a target date.

promptGenerator.title: AI Content Prompt Generator
promptGenerator.description: Use this form to generate a structured prompt for requesting new or modified content.
promptGenerator.searchArticlePlaceholder: Type to search articles by title or slug...
promptGenerator.draftPlaceholder: Paste your full content draft here...
promptGenerator.originalContentTitle: Original Content (The file you want to edit)
promptGenerator.originalContentPlaceholder: Paste the current full MDX content of the file here...
promptGenerator.modInstructionsPlaceholder: What exactly do you want to change? (e.g., Update the intro, add a conclusion about design updates...)

downloadLinks.title: Download Links
downloadLinks.description: Map [DOWNLOAD_X] placeholders to existing IDs from our database or enter new URLs.
downloadLinks.promptInstruction: Please replace the [DOWNLOAD_X] placeholders in the draft with <DownloadButton> components using the corresponding settings below:

imageGrid.title: Image Grids (Sequential)
imageGrid.description: Enter grid data one per line (format: cols | path1, path2...).
imageGrid.promptInstruction: Please group the following images using the <ImageGrid> component:

promptGenerator.imagesDescription: The first line is ALWAYS for the hero image, separated by a `|` for the alt text.
promptGenerator.imagesPlaceholder:
/images/blank/blank.webp | Hero alt text
/images/articles/sub.webp | Sub alt text
promptGenerator.imagesDescriptionNote: Insert path and alt text for images to be embedded within the note's content.
promptGenerator.articleTitleDescription: An English title is recommended. For best SEO, MUST be between 50-60 characters.
promptGenerator.promptBaseBlog: Please create and publish a new blog article for me based on the following details. The English version must use the slug specified, and the Indonesian version must also use the EXACT SAME SLUG.
promptGenerator.promptBaseBlogIdOnly: Please create and publish a new blog article for me in INDONESIAN ONLY based on the following details.
promptGenerator.promptBaseNote: Please create and publish a new technical note for me based on the following details.
promptGenerator.promptBaseNoteIdOnly: Please create and publish a new technical note for me in INDONESIAN ONLY based on the following details.
promptGenerator.modifyPromptBase: Please MODIFY an existing content for me. IMPORTANT: You MUST keep the ORIGINAL SLUG AND ORIGINAL PUBLISH DATE. ONLY change what is requested in the instructions. DO NOT rewrite sections that are not related to the request. Keep all existing technical steps, code blocks, and images intact unless specified.
promptGenerator.finalInstruction: Additional Instruction: 1. Confirm translationKey and English slug. 2. Title length MUST BE 50-60 characters. 3. STRICT MDX ADHERENCE: Use only supported components (<DownloadButton />, <ImageGrid />, standard Markdown tables). 4. React Compliance: ALWAYS use 'className'. 5. Image Alt Text: Generate high-quality SEO alt text if missing.

notifications.stockEmpty: Selected period is out of stock
notifications.authNotReady: Login system is not ready. Please try again.
notifications.loginError: Failed to sign in. Please check your connection.
notifications.limitReached: Usage limit reached. Please try again in 10 minutes.

laptopServiceEstimator.title: Laptop Service Estimator
laptopServiceEstimator.description: Describe the laptop issue and AI will suggest likely service actions with instant cost estimates.

a.title: Device Identity
a.modelHint: Include specific series (e.g., X441U) for more accurate AI specs.
a.scanHint: Don't know the model? Upload a photo of the label on the bottom of the laptop.

b.title: What's the Problem?
b.placeholder: e.g., Laptop is slow, keyboard not working, frequent restarts...
b.placeholderHistory: e.g., Battery replaced 2023, SSD changed 1 year ago...

c.title: Select Services If You Already Know
c.optionalHint: Optional. If you are unsure, AI will infer the likely service from your complaint.

cleaning.label: Cleaning Internal
cleaning.desc: Clean fan, heatsink, and internal dust

diagnosa.label: Diagnosis & Estimate
diagnosa.desc: Free, AI will analyze your complaint and suggest the right service

form.submitHint: Enter the laptop brand and complaint details to continue. Service selection is optional.
form.loadingDesc: Searching for laptop specs and calculating service costs.

result.unverifiedDesc: Device details will be confirmed during consultation via WhatsApp.
result.totalNote: Service fees only, parts not included
result.disclaimer: Prices above are estimated service fees only. Component/spare part prices are not included. Final price will be confirmed after physical device inspection.
result.waGreeting: Hi, I'd like to consult about laptop service with Mas Iwan,
